Class AbstractModel

java.lang.Object
Model.AbstractModel
Direct Known Subclasses:
CalendarModel
public abstract class AbstractModel extends Object
Base class for models that need to notify observers about state changes.

It wraps a PropertyChangeSupport, which implements the subject side of the Observer pattern used by the view layer.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected PropertyChangeSupport
    propertyChangeSupport
    Delegate that keeps the registered listeners and dispatches events.

  • Constructor Summary

    Creates the model with an empty listener list.

  • Method Details

    • addPropertyChangeListener

      public void addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Registers an observer.
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to add

    • removePropertyChangeListener

      public void removePropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Removes a previously registered observer.
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to remove

    • firePropertyChange

      protected void firePropertyChange(String propertyName, Object oldValue, Object newValue)
      Notifies the observers that a property changed.
      Parameters:
      propertyName - the property name
      oldValue - the previous value
      newValue - the new value
